trivia: The queen of long-haul twins. Its GE90-115B remains among the most powerful jet engines ever certified, and for fifteen years this was the airplane on nearly every flagship route on Earth.
Listen for it: the GE90's low churning growl on approach is a spotter favorite, and the sheer size of the engine is visible from remarkable distances.
funFacts: The GE90-115B holds thrust records at over 115,000 lbf.
